name: Colorado Wedding and Elopement Officiant Julie Adriansen

reviews.text:
We eloped in Vail, CO on January 15.  Julie officiated, the ceremony she created and conducted exceeded any expectations or anything we could have dreamed of.  We had a phone call with Julie, prior to our trip.  During that call we told Julie our story and answered a few questions.  The ceremony she wrote reflected every bit of our journey together and with such detail and heart.
It went beyond words, she brought love, such kindness and emotion.  The ceremony will remain in our hearts and I have such gratitude for Julie.  Additionally, she will listen to your story and what you’re wishing for in a ceremony in a way that will blow your mind.  We would recommend Julie, and would never be able to imagine our ceremony and Julie’s kindness and professionalism from anyone else.
Thank you from the bottom of our hearts Julie!

Julie, the officiant from Vail, went above and beyond from the very beginning. Her process leading up to the ceremony was exceptional—organized, thoughtful, and very attentive to every detail. She guided us through the marriage license process in Eagle County and made sure we understood each step clearly. She provided helpful insight into how the ceremony would flow, which gave us so much peace of mind. On the wedding day, she was fully present and helped make everything feel less stressful. Looking back, we truly couldn’t have been happier than to have Julie as our officiant. Her warmth, attentiveness, and professionalism made our day incredibly special. We’re so grateful and highly recommend her to anyone getting married in the area!

Wow! What an amazing and memorable experience. I selected Julie to perform a vow renewal ceremony for our 40th Anniversary in Vail, CO on a mountain top. She took my input and crafted a ceremony that perfectly fit what I was looking for. Julie is kind, caring, professional and amazing at what she does. I highly recommend her if you are thinking about utilizing her services.

Julie is awesome - straight up. She just officiated our micro-wedding last week in the Colorado National Monument and it was so sweet and intimate. She took the time to meet with us via Zoom prior to the event to get to know us and crafted a perfect little ceremony to reflect us as a couple and include short antidotes about us, our favorite poem and unique vows inspired by a former educator of mine. We highly recommend working with Julie!

Julie officiated our wedding in early June and we could not be happier that we found her! From the moment we made contact with her she was super responsive, kind, and personable. After our ceremony, all of our friends and family mentioned how wonderful Julie was. Everyone loved her! 10/10 recommend!
